Both current and former Racers of the Year are here to run 
the 3 000-meter turf of the G2 Hanshin Daishoten.

After her recent losses, this race will be crucial to Narita 
Brian if she wants to prove that she's back to form.
You can do it, Brian!
Mayano! You're the best!
They're ready at the gate, and… there's the start!

Narita Brian starts off strong! The other racers aren't far 
behind!
Prepare for take off!

The victor of last year's Arima Kinen, Mayano Top Gun, is 
flying fast as she passes Narita Brian!

The runners are pacing themselves as they pass the stands 
on the first lap.
Brian…

She's carrying herself well. It'll come down to how much 
strength she can wring out at the end.

Brian's trying her best, so we've got to give her all our 
support!
I've got plenty to give! Go get 'em, Brian!

They're in the backstretch, and Mayano Top Gun is 
holding fourth. Narita Brian is behind her in sixth.

The racers haven't made any big moves yet as they turn 
the third corner into the last 1 000 meters.
Here it is! Target locked on!

Wait! Mayano Top Gun's going for it with a long sprint! 
She's leapt to the front!

And Narita Brian's in pursuit! It's a match between Mayano 
Top Gun and Narita Brian!

It's a dogfight in the final stretch! Can Narita Brian pull it 
off this time?!
Hyaaaaah!
Huff, huff, huff!
Go, go, Mayano!
Keep going, Briaaan!
Everyone must see me differently than they used to.
But I haven't changed!
Huh?! Time to make my final approach!
The hunger in my heart, my desire to race…
The fire inside me blazes fiercer than ever!
Narita Brian isn't falling even a single step behind!

Narita Brian's passing from outside! Mayano Top Gun 
comes back from inside!
Who's pulling ahead?! Could it be Brian?!
HAAAAAGH!
Brian inches ahead at the finish!
Narita Brian takes first!

The stands erupt with applause! The winner of this fierce 
match is Narita Brian!
Way to go, Brian!
Both of you ran amazingly!
…Heh.
